invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破600（支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 600 (support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1850（关键支撑）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1850 (key support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破66000（关键支撑）或融资费率转正超过0.005%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 66000 (key support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.005% (short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破650（阻力位）或融资费率转负超过-0.005%（多头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 650 (resistance) or funding rate turns negative below -0.005% (long pressure easing).
